name: should create a player receiving yards count-per-game with threshold query (output aggregator)
description: Phase C step 1 snapshot: native `output` param dispatch on player_receiving_yards_from_plays using aggregator-count (period=game, aggregation=count, threshold>=100). Exercises Outer SELECT dispatch + COALESCE(trg_pid) AS pid grouping in build_period_cte for plays-source columns.
expected_query: with "count_game_66250c74a2cc" as materialized (select CONCAT(nfl_games.year, '_', nfl_games.week, '_', nfl_games.esbid) AS period_key, "nfl_games"."year", nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.comp = true THEN nfl_plays.recv_yds ELSE 0 END) AS measure_total from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" group by nfl_plays.trg_pid, CONCAT(nfl_games.year, '_', nfl_games.week, '_', nfl_games.esbid)), "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" as materialized (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true THEN recv_yds ELSE 0 END) as rec_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_PRE_WEEK_1', '2023_PRE_WEEK_2', '2023_PRE_WEEK_3', '2023_PRE_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_2', '2023_REG_WEEK_3', '2023_REG_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_5', '2023_REG_WEEK_6', '2023_REG_WEEK_7', '2023_REG_WEEK_8', '2023_REG_WEEK_9', '2023_REG_WEEK_10', '2023_REG_WEEK_11', '2023_REG_WEEK_12', '2023_REG_WEEK_13', '2023_REG_WEEK_14', '2023_REG_WEEK_15', '2023_REG_WEEK_16', '2023_REG_WEEK_17', '2023_REG_WEEK_18', '2023_POST_WEEK_1', '2023_POST_WEEK_2', '2023_POST_WEEK_3', '2023_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by COALESCE(trg_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, COUNT(DISTINCT count_game_66250c74a2cc.period_key) FILTER (WHERE count_game_66250c74a2cc.measure_total >= 100) AS count_value_0, "player"."pos" from "player" left join "count_game_66250c74a2cc" on "count_game_66250c74a2cc"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" on "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
